results.name: Iran

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. Gaza attacked 218 of 243 ceasefire days; 36% of allocated aid trucks entered; 3,076+ violations; Oxfam 100+ days water deprivation; 70%-seizure plan advancing. Reinforces floor; cannot move lower.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: WARN-HELD-NOT-SCORABLE boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 deadline PASSED, terminations executed (~30k forced to sign releases) BUT WA/MO investigations now CLOSED with no resolution/ruling/settlement (web check 06-11). WARN-avoidance theory remains pre-adjudication. Hold maintained; adverse ruling would push into Critical. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: COORDINATED-INVESTIGATION-STILL-PRE-ADJUDICATION confirm at 10.2. DOJ MA risk-score probe + coordinated multi-AG investigations + AI claim-denial cases + shareholder suit raise enforcement DENSITY but remain pre-adjudication. CEO churn (Witty->Hemsley) = governance. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: PRICED-IN-RECENT-ADJUSTMENT / ESCALATION-WITHIN-PATTERN confirm at 15.6 (applied 06-01). ~5,000 detect-delete-deport expulsions incl Indian Muslim citizens/Rohingya without due process (HRW/USCIRF/UN) deepen an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile; escalation within pattern. results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: PRICED-CONTINUATION / NON-STATE-DRIVEN confirm at 4.7. UN SG June 8 harrowing-needs visit; record 1.5M IDPs; PaP IDPs exceeded 300k first time; 110k+ forced returns. Gang-driven collapse already priced near floor; not a new state-harm category. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 9 cluster-munition school attack (Karen State, 6 killed); June 9 airstrike killed Karenni youth leader; June 4 hospital hit in Kachin; 5.2M displaced. Reinforces floor; cannot move lower.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. 28.9M acutely food insecure; RSF systematic attacks on hospitals/camps + ethnically-motivated el-Fasher detention killings (Foreign Policy June 11); $2.8B appeal 40% funded. UAE complicity scored under UAE. Reinforces floor.

results.name: Uganda
results.key_finding: NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at boundary 20.3 (20/21 edge). Ebola Bundibugyo cross-border importation; Kampala/Wakiso cases rising from 19 (June 6); all traced to DRC travel, community transmission not yet ruled out; WHO/MOH response, no obstruction. Exogenous shock, non-double-counted. Reconstruct EXACT.

FL immigration arrests surged to 39k/416d (all 67 counties 287(g)); ICE ended detainee-death reporting June 4; GAO June 9 Fort Bliss homicide w/ destroyed evidence; HUD abandons housing-first. Escalation within priced pattern, not new floor harm. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: Anthropic

June 11 Amodei block-unsafe-models push + $350M pledge + Advanced AI Framework (third-party testing, revenue-tied penalties) are prospective governance-posture positives; IPO S-1 (~$965B) is a corporate-structure event. Not an operative compassion-conduct change. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: North Korea
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR / STATE-FORCED-LABOR confirm at 0.0. 100k+ North Koreans in transnational forced labor across 40 countries; confiscated passports, 12-16h days, 364d/yr; wages to nuclear program; entering EU supply chains. Reinforces existing absolute floor; EU-supply-chain dimension is importer-side enforcement, not a basis to move the DPRK floor. Cannot move lower.

The EU high-risk-database obligation (due June 14) is an importer-side enforcement question scored against importing states/firms, not against the DPRK sovereign floor.

United States published 'United States' (countries rank 153, composite 17.5, Critical, applied). Reconstruct EXACT. 06-11 immigration-enforcement/detention-death evidence is escalation within the priced same-regime pattern at the applied score, not new un-priced multi-category floor harm.

methodology_rulings.ruling: Oracle held at BOUNDARY 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). The June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline has now PASSED and terminations are EXECUTED: ~30,000 workers were required to sign legal releases waiving the right to sue or forfeit severance, with the WARN 60-day pay period consumed as severance, RSUs forfeited without acceleration, and H-1B/cancer/pregnant workers disproportionately affected. Per the standing hold, the test was whether executed-or-adjudicated terminations make the ALGORITHM/WARN-AVOIDANCE theory scorable. Web check 06-11: the WA and MO WARN-Act investigations are now CLOSED (Strauss Borrelli) with NO public resolution, NO AG ruling, and NO settlement. Executed terminations alone do not constitute an adverse adjudication; the 60-day-as-severance structuring remains a disputed-but-unadjudicated compliance interpretation that courts have historically treated as lawful in many circuits. Absent a verified adverse ruling/settlement, the un-priced harm is NOT verified. HOLD MAINTAINED at boundary 20.6; an adverse WARN-avoidance adjudication would push into Critical.

methodology_rulings.category: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR / FLOOR-REINFORCEMENT (Israel + Myanmar + Sudan + North Korea)
methodology_rulings.ruling: Four entities re-affirmed at the absolute 0.0 floor (all dims 1.0, harm-flag override, integrationPremium 0). Israel: Gaza attacked 218/243 ceasefire days, 36% of allocated aid entered, 3,076+ violations, Oxfam 100+ days water deprivation, 70%-seizure plan advancing. Myanmar: June 9 cluster-munition school attack in Karen State (6 killed), June 9 airstrike on a Karenni youth leader, June 4 hospital hit in Kachin. Sudan: 28.9M acutely food insecure, RSF systematic attacks on hospitals/camps and ethnically-motivated el-Fasher detention killings (Foreign Policy June 11). North Korea: state-orchestrated transnational forced labor (100k+ across 40 countries, confiscated passports, 12-16h/364d, wages to nuclear program, entering EU supply chains). All reinforce in-territory/state active-perpetration but cannot move the floor. UAE (Sudan/RSF arming) and EU-importer (DPRK supply-chain) external dimensions are scored under those actors, never double-counted against the sovereign floors.

Ebola Bundibugyo PHEIC treated as an EXOGENOUS shock overlaid on existing capacity, NON-DOUBLE-COUNTED where the response is WHO/Africa-CDC-coordinated with no deliberate state obstruction. DRC re-affirmed at near-floor 2.3 (escalating 635/127, up from 598/115; no Bundibugyo vaccine; shock on already-priced near-total incapacity). Uganda confirmed at BOUNDARY 20.3 (cross-border importation, Kampala/Wakiso cases rising from 19; all traced to DRC travel, community transmission not yet ruled out; WHO/MOH contact-tracing active). Cross-border importation does not lower Uganda's score absent documented response failure or obstruction; its pre-existing repression/LGBTQ-criminalization profile is already priced. Both reconstruct EXACT.

Iran re-affirmed at floor-adjacent 2.5 (124th-week No-to-Executions campaign across 56 prisons; 2 Kurdish political prisoners executed June 1; 40+ political executions since Feb 28; 784+ YTD -- single dominant extremity already priced, no new multi-category 0.0 threshold). Haiti re-affirmed at 4.7 (UN SG June 8 harrowing-needs visit; record 1.5M IDPs; PaP IDPs exceeded 300k first time; 110k+ forced returns -- gang-driven collapse is non-state-driven continuation already priced near floor; not a new state-harm category). Both reconstruct EXACT.

methodology_rulings.category: PRICED / SAME-REGIME-CONTINUATION + ESCALATION-WITHIN-PATTERN (Bolivia + India + United States)
methodology_rulings.ruling: All three are AT recently-applied scores and the 06-11 evidence is same-regime continuation already priced. Bolivia 18.4 (from 28.4): June 8 military-crackdown law + 10 killed/365+ arrested + ILO/HRW Convention-87 condemnation are the events the applied downgrade encoded. India 15.6 (applied 06-01): ~5,000 detect-delete-deport expulsions incl Indian Muslim citizens/Rohingya without due process deepen an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile; escalation within pattern. United States 17.5 (applied): FL immigration-arrest surge (39k/416d, all 67 counties 287(g)), ICE ending detainee-death reporting (June 4), GAO Fort Bliss homicide w/ destroyed evidence (June 9), HUD abandoning housing-first deepen an EQU 1.4/EMP 1.5/ACC 1.4 profile; escalation within the priced same-regime pattern, not new un-priced multi-category floor harm. All reconstruct EXACT.

UnitedHealth confirmed at 10.2: a DOJ criminal Medicare-Advantage risk-score-inflation probe + coordinated multi-AG investigations (announced June 2026) + active AI-claim-denial cases + a shareholder suit raise enforcement DENSITY but remain pre-adjudication (investigation does not equal adjudication); the CEO change (Witty -> Hemsley) is governance churn. No crossing to scorable. Reconstruct EXACT.

Confirm at 59.1. The June 11 Amodei push for government authority to block unsafe models, the $350M pledge ($200M Economic Futures Fund + $150M fellowship), and the Advanced AI Framework (mandatory third-party safety testing, revenue-tied civil penalties) are prospective governance-POSTURE positives, and the June 1 IPO S-1 (~$965B) is a corporate-STRUCTURE event -- neither is an operative compassion-CONDUCT change. The Great American AI Act is a June 4 discussion draft, proposed not enacted. Net-neutral; no new un-priced harm. Reconstruct EXACT.

Five rotation entities (staleness-selected, last_assessed:never) confirmed at the published 35.9 (Developing); scanner evidence_found:false over the 14-day lookback (no acute negative event). Balanced ~2.5 baseline profile with an EQU 2.0 relative soft spot. All reconstruct EXACT.

framing_corrections.correction: A passed deadline with executed terminations can read as the trigger that makes the WARN-avoidance theory scorable, but the trigger condition was an ADJUDICATION, not mere execution. The WA/MO investigations closing with no adverse ruling/settlement means the disputed 60-day-as-severance structuring is unverified as a harm; held at boundary 20.6 pending adjudication.

Forced-labor-in-EU-supply-chains evidence is a genuine new signal, but North Korea is already at the absolute 0.0 floor -- the evidence reinforces rather than moves it. The scorable axis the new evidence opens (EU high-risk-database / importer due diligence by June 14) attaches to importing states and firms, not to the DPRK sovereign score.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: WARN-HELD POST-DEADLINE: the June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline has PASSED and ~30,000 terminations are executed, but the WA/MO WARN-Act investigations closed with NO adverse ruling/settlement (web check 06-11). Executed-but-unadjudicated terminations do not verify the un-priced WARN-avoidance harm; held at boundary 20.6. The clearest carry-forward watch in the set -- an adverse adjudication would push Oracle into Critical.

Four sovereign 0.0-floor confirmations reinforced by acute 06-11 evidence (Gaza ceasefire-violation/aid-denial with a 70%-seizure plan; Karen cluster-munition school attack; RSF el-Fasher detention killings amid 28.9M food-insecure; DPRK transnational state forced labor reaching EU supply chains). All reinforce but cannot move the floor; UAE (Sudan) and EU-importer (DPRK) external dimensions scored under those actors, no double-count.

Ebola Bundibugyo PHEIC escalating (DRC 635/127, up +37/+12 in a day; Uganda cross-border importation into Kampala) treated as EXOGENOUS-SHOCK NON-DOUBLE-COUNT: a WHO/Africa-CDC-coordinated, non-obstructed response does not lower scores absent documented response failure. DRC near-floor 2.3, Uganda boundary 20.3. Carry-forward watch on sustained Kampala community transmission.
